data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that 'Some providers work multiple locations', but the evidence does not explicitly confirm this. While the use case mentions that Dr. Williams works at two different locations, it does not provide sufficient evidence to demonstrate that this is a general feature applicable to all providers. The lack of concrete API reads or persisted state checks to confirm this requirement leads to a clear gap in the evidence provided.
gaps: No evidence confirming that multiple providers work across different locations.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
